name: FEDEX CORP
summary: FedEx Corporation is a Delaware-incorporated holding company providing transportation, e-commerce, and business services worldwide. Its portfolio includes Federal Express (integrated air-ground express network), FedEx Freight (LTL freight), FedEx Logistics (customs brokerage, freight forwarding, supply chain), FedEx Office (document and business services), and FedEx Dataworks (digital solutions). FedEx operates a global network and pursues efficiency through its DRIVE program, Network 2.0, and the one FedEx consolidation initiative.

products.name: Federal Express
products.description: Integrated air-ground express package pickup, transport, and delivery network in the U.S. and internationally.

products.name: FedEx Freight
products.description: Less-than-truckload (LTL) freight transportation services provided as a separate subsidiary.

products.name: FedEx Logistics
products.description: Customs brokerage, global ocean and air freight forwarding, and integrated supply chain management solutions.

products.name: FedEx Office
products.description: Document and business services and retail access to FedEx package transportation businesses.

products.name: FedEx Dataworks
products.description: Digital solutions to transform physical and digital experiences for customers and team members.

products.name: FedEx Custom Critical
products.description: Specialty critical shipping services, included in the FedEx Freight segment as of fiscal 2025.

products.name: FedEx Supply Chain
products.description: Integrated supply chain distribution system managed through FedEx Supply Chain Distribution System, Inc.

products.name: Network 2.0
products.description: Multi-year initiative to improve efficiency of package pickup, transport, and delivery in the U.S. and Canada.

products.name: DRIVE
products.description: Comprehensive program to improve long-term profitability, reduce overhead, and transform digital capabilities.

products.name: Tricolor
products.description: Redesign of the Federal Express international air network to improve efficiency and asset utilization.

people.name: Earnings Call Transcript
people.role: March 19, 2026  Jenifer Hollander  Vice President-Investor Relations, FedEx Corp
